title: Matilda's Squirrel Debrief
text:
## Squirrel Debrief

**Subject:** Matilda, dark red golden retriever

**Time of sighting:** {number} minutes after breakfast.

**Suspect:** A {adjective} {color} {animal} near the {place}.

**Initial response:** Matilda {past-tense verb}, then attempted to {verb} {adverb} while the leash became a {adjective} {object}.

**Treat negotiation:** Handler offered {food}; Matilda accepted with {emotion} but continued {verb ending in -ing}.

**Damage:** {number} {plural noun} startled, one {body part} covered in grass.

**Recommendation:** More practice with {adjective} squirrels.
